row2_auxiliary_summary.ego_motion_trend: Forward motion along a straight road with slight rightward drift or lane change indicated by trajectory lines.
row2_auxiliary_summary.main_object_trajectory_trend: Static objects (buildings, parked cars) show consistent depth; moving vehicles follow expected paths relative to ego.

semantic.scene_summary: Urban street scene under clear daylight. Road has multiple lanes, crosswalks, curbs, and traffic markings. Buildings line both sides. Vehicles include trucks, SUVs, and sedans in motion or parked.
semantic.visibility_notes: All elements clearly visible with natural lighting and shadows. No occlusions obscure critical traffic features.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Smooth forward progression of ego vehicle. Objects move naturally with perspective changes. No sudden jumps or disappearances.
logical.object_continuity: Vehicles maintain consistent size and position over time. Pedestrians (if any) would be continuous — none observed here.
logical.structure_continuity: Road geometry, building facades, and infrastructure remain stable and coherent across frames.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle moves forward steadily, maintaining lane position. Slight adjustment toward right side may indicate lane following or avoidance.
decision.risk_context: No immediate hazards detected. Traffic flow appears orderly. Crosswalk is clear. No yielding or braking required based on visible context.

semantic.scene_summary: Similar urban street layout but with noticeable artifacts. Road structure preserved but some details blurred or distorted. Vehicles present but less defined.
key_objects: silver SUV - partially obscured or merged
traffic_elements: lane dividers - sometimes broken or shifted
curb edges - occasionally wavy or missing segments
semantic.visibility_notes: Overall scene recognizable but suffers from blurring, edge distortion, and occasional object merging. Some elements appear duplicated or smeared.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Forward motion generally smooth but exhibits minor flickering in object boundaries. Some vehicles show slight positional jitter between frames.
logical.object_continuity: Most objects persist across frames but with degraded definition. Occasional ghosting or partial disappearance near frame transitions.
logical.structure_continuity: Road and building structures mostly continuous but exhibit subtle warping or stretching, especially near periphery.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle continues forward with similar trajectory as Row 1. Minor lateral adjustments still visible but less precise.
decision.risk_context: Reduced clarity of traffic elements may impair downstream decision-making. No overt risk indicators, but scene ambiguity increases uncertainty.

missing_or_weakened_elements: definition of curb and fence textures
newly_introduced_elements: blurred transitions between static and dynamic objects
artifacts_or_instabilities: reduced fidelity in small-scale features like poles and signage
